evals.name: basic-usage
evals.prompt: Help me with a typical dad-joke task
expectations: The response explains what makes a joke a dad joke, using elements like puns and simplicity
The response includes an example of a typical dad joke
The response offers guidance on how to construct a dad joke with a pun.
The response mentions that dad jokes should be wholesome and short.
The response might include formats such as question-and-answer, one-liners, or setup-punchline.
